projects.name: specorator
projects.description: Your development cockpit inside Obsidian. Guides you from idea to release through an 11-stage workflow — spec drafting, task generation, quality gates — with Claude Code agents doing the busywork. All artifacts stay in your vault as plain Markdown.

projects.name: specorator-runtime
projects.description: The planned orchestration bridge that connects specorator's UI to the agent and workflow subsystems. Once live, it enables real-time agent sessions, task queuing, and event streaming across the full ecosystem.

projects.name: agentonomous
projects.description: TypeScript library for building autonomous agents. Provides the building blocks for intelligent task execution — the foundation that powers specorator's AI coworker features in v2.0, including spec drafting, review assistance, and workflow progression.

projects.name: agentic-workflow
projects.description: The 11-stage development methodology (Idea → Research → Requirements → Design → Specification → Tasks → Implementation → Testing → Review → Release → Retrospective) with templates, quality gates, and Claude Code agents. Use it standalone or as the engine powering specorator.
